title: Shield Failures
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM ShieldState WHERE ShieldsUp = 0 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {count} shield failure(s) recorded during the report period — each one a moment when incoming fire overwhelmed the shield generator, leaving the hull directly exposed to weapons fire until shields recharged. Shield failures in sustained combat often precede hull breaches.
details.help: ShieldState with ShieldsUp = false (0) indicates shields dropped. Each event is a moment of genuine danger.

tagLines: Shield integrity breach events logged. Pilots Federation safety advisory: consider shield reinforcement.
That many shield failures means you were in some real fights. Or you're very bad at range management.
Each drop is a heartbeat — the moment between 'this is fine' and 'get to the escape hatch'.
